source:
'use client'; import { useState } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Plus, Search, Edit, Trash2, Eye } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; const posts = [ { id: 1, title: 'Top Interior Design Trends 2024', category: 'Interior Design', status: 'published', date: 'Dec 15, 2024' }, { id: 2, title: 'Choosing Perfect Color Palette', category: 'Home Decor', status: 'draft', date: 'Nov 28, 2024' }, ]; export default function AdminBlog() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); return (

Blog

Manage blog posts.

setSearch(e.target.value)} className="pl-10" />
{posts.map((post) => ( ))}
Title Category Status Date Actions
{post.title} {post.category} {post.status} {post.date}
); }

source:
'use client'; import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { FolderOpen, Star, MessageSquare, Eye, TrendingUp, Users, ImageIcon, HardDrive } from 'lucide-react'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; const stats = [ { label: 'Total Projects', value: '24', icon: FolderOpen, change: '+12%', color: 'bg-blue-500', href: '/admin/projects' }, { label: 'Testimonials', value: '18', icon: Star, change: '+8%', color: 'bg-[#C8A97E]', href: '/admin/testimonials' }, { label: 'Inquiries', value: '45', icon: MessageSquare, change: '+23%', color: 'bg-green-500', href: '/admin/inquiries' }, { label: 'Page Views', value: '12.5K', icon: Eye, change: '+18%', color: 'bg-purple-500', href: '#' }, ]; const recentInquiries = [ { name: 'Priya Sharma', email: 'priya@email.com', service: 'Residential', date: '2 hours ago' }, { name: 'Rajesh Mehta', email: 'rajesh@email.com', service: 'Commercial', date: '5 hours ago' }, { name: 'Anita Patel', email: 'anita@email.com', service: 'Kitchen', date: '1 day ago' }, { name: 'Vikram Singh', email: 'vikram@email.com', service: 'Office', date: '2 days ago' }, ]; export default function AdminDashboard() { const [imageStats, setImageStats] = useState<{ total: number; storageMB: string; latest: { title: string; imageUrl: string; createdAt: string; _id: string }[] } | null>(null); useEffect(() => { fetch('/api/admin/images?limit=5') .then(r => r.json()) .then(data => { if (data.success) { setImageStats({ total: data.pagination?.total || 0, storageMB: '0', latest: data.images?.slice(0, 5) || [], }); } }) .catch(() => {}); }, []); return (

Dashboard

Welcome back! Here's your overview.

{stats.map((stat, index) => { const Icon = stat.icon; return (
{stat.change}
{stat.value}
{stat.label}
 ); })}
{/* Image Stats Card */}
{imageStats?.total ?? '-'}
Total Images
{imageStats?.storageMB ? `${imageStats.storageMB} MB` : 'Calculating...'}
{imageStats?.storageMB ? `${imageStats.storageMB} MB` : '-'}
Storage Used
Monthly Leads
Chart Placeholder
Recent Inquiries View all
{recentInquiries.map((inquiry) => (

{inquiry.name}

{inquiry.service} • {inquiry.date}

))}
{/* Recent Uploads */} {imageStats && imageStats.latest.length > 0 && ( Recent Uploads View all
{imageStats.latest.map((img) => (

{img.title}

{new Date(img.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}

))}
)}
); }

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

'use client'; import { useState } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Plus, Search, Edit, Trash2, Eye, MoreHorizontal } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; const projects = [ { id: 1, title: 'Modern Villa', category: 'Residential', status: 'published', featured: true }, { id: 2, title: 'Corporate Office', category: 'Office', status: 'published', featured: false }, { id: 3, title: 'Luxury Kitchen', category: 'Kitchen', status: 'draft', featured: false }, ]; export default function AdminProjects() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); return (

Projects

Manage your portfolio projects.

setSearch(e.target.value)} className="pl-10" />
{projects.map((project) => ( ))}
Title Category Status Featured Actions
{project.title} {project.category} {project.status} {project.featured ? Featured : No}
); }
